title: Guys and Dolls
writer: Jo Swerling, Abe Burrows, Damon Runyon
actors: Marlon Brando, Jean Simmons, Frank Sinatra
plot: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 3 wins & 8 nominations total
